interpretation: Fixture dry-run result is advisory only; collect 20 live browser tasks before changing the Browser roadmap branch.

firstOptInEvidence.note: First opt-in run is end-to-end chain proof with a stub adapter. After D-118 batch run, the cumulative live result count is 4/20. 16/20 remain pending and binding remains false until 20/20 are recorded through real Browser automation in D-119+.

firstBatchEvidence.note: First batch opt-in run records 3 additional completed live results in 1 call. The function design supports batchSize up to 20 (which would flip binding to true), but the D-118 live ledger update only advances 1->4 to keep the binding claim honest with stub data. Future D-119+ can use the same batch function at higher sizes when real Browser automation is integrated.
